subcodes.title: Words to some Eastern pilgrims, spoken on 1914-01-19
subcodes.first_line: You are a good party! God willing, you shall have good weather on your journey! May you expend your days in the utmost joy and fragrance!
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @call to action, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
